parameters.query:
SELECT 
    c.video_assessment_id,
    c.name AS candidate_name,
    c.email AS candidate_email,
    c.job_title,
    c.experience_level,
    r.full_transcript,
    r.security_report AS client_security_report,
    r.video_duration,
    r.video_url,
    j.required_skills,
    j.optional_skills,
    j.salary_budget,
    j.difficulty,
    
    -- NEW: Add Python video analysis data
    a.emotion_analysis,
    a.attention_metrics,
    a.face_detection,
    a.violations_summary,
    a.processing_time_seconds,
    a.frames_processed,
    
    json_agg(
        json_build_object(
            'question_id', q.question_id,
            'question_text', q.question_text,
            'category', q.category,
            'difficulty', q.difficulty,
            'time_limit', q.time_limit,
            'evaluation_criteria', q.evaluation_criteria,
            'key_points', q.key_points
        ) ORDER BY q.question_id
    ) AS questions
FROM video_interview_candidates c
INNER JOIN video_interview_responses r 
    ON c.video_assessment_id = r.video_assessment_id
INNER JOIN video_job_requirements j 
    ON c.video_assessment_id = j.video_assessment_id
LEFT JOIN video_interview_questions q 
    ON c.video_assessment_id = q.video_assessment_id
-- NEW: Join with Python analysis results
LEFT JOIN video_analysis_results a
    ON c.video_assessment_id = a.video_assessment_id
WHERE c.video_assessment_id = $1
  AND c.status = 'completed'
  AND c.videos_uploaded = true
GROUP BY 
    c.video_assessment_id, c.name, c.email, c.job_title, c.experience_level,
    r.full_transcript, r.security_report, r.video_duration, r.video_url,
    j.required_skills, j.optional_skills, j.salary_budget, j.difficulty,
    a.emotion_analysis, a.attention_metrics, a.face_detection, 
    a.violations_summary, a.processing_time_seconds, a.frames_processed

options.systemMessage: You are an expert technical interviewer. Analyze the candidate's answers and return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format requested. Do not include any explanatory text outside the JSON structure.

parameters.query:
UPDATE public.video_interview_evaluations
SET final_decision = 'hire',
    decision_by = 'HR',
    decision_at = NOW()
WHERE video_assessment_id = $1;

UPDATE public.video_interview_evaluations
SET final_decision = 'reject',
    decision_by = 'HR',
    decision_at = NOW()
WHERE video_assessment_id = $1;

parameters.subject: =Final Review Required: {{$json.video_assessment_id}} Candidate Decision Approval
parameters.message:
=

🎯 Candidate Decision Approval

A new AI interview evaluation is ready for your review and final decision.

👤 Candidate Details

Name: {{ $json.candidate_name }}
Email: {{ $json.candidate_email }}
Assessment ID: {{ $json.video_assessment_id }}

📊 Evaluation Summary

Interview Score: {{ $json.interview_score }}/100
Security Score: {{ $json.security_score }}/100
Final Score: {{ $json.final_score }}/100
AI Recommendation: {{ $json.recommendation }}

📝 Required Action

Please review this evaluation and choose one option:

Approve Decline

Thank you,
CBC AI System
